verifyNote: Confirmed via FIFA, SoFi Stadium, and NBC Sports: the Dec 5 2025 final draw placed USA in Group D, and the USMNT opens the tournament vs Paraguay at SoFi on Jun 12 2026, kickoff 6:00 PM PT.

hype.label: Unmissable
hype.blurb: The USMNT's home World Cup opener in front of 70,000 in LA. If you can get in the building, you go. This is the loudest SoFi will ever be.

factors.v: Co-host opener, must-win to set up the group
Sellout USA home crowd, biggest US soccer night ever
USA's first WC group game on home soil since 1994
Pulisic, Weah, Pepi vs Almiron-led Paraguay

preview.summary: The United States kicks off its home World Cup against a gritty, defensively stubborn Paraguay side in Group D. As co-hosts under no qualifying pressure, the USMNT has had a long runway to peak for this moment, and a win here all but unlocks the round of 32. Expect a partisan, deafening SoFi crowd willing the hosts forward.
preview.homeForm: Tuned up through a string of friendlies with a settled core and home-field momentum.
preview.awayForm: Battled through tough CONMEBOL qualifying as a compact, counter-attacking unit.
preview.homeKey: Christian Pulisic, the talisman expected to carry the attack
preview.awayKey: Miguel Almiron, the pace and creativity on the break
storylines: USMNT's first World Cup group match on home soil since 1994
Can Pulisic deliver a defining moment in front of a home crowd
Paraguay's low block vs the pressure of being the favorite at home
preview.h2h: Historically lopsided in the USA's favor, but the meetings have been infrequent and friendly-heavy.
preview.prediction: USA 2-0 Paraguay. SoFi erupts, Pulisic gets his moment, and the host nation opens with a statement. Bring earplugs and a flag.

tickets.sellout: Effectively sold out at face value; the only realistic path in is resale, which will run well above sticker.
tickets.bestValue: Upper-level corners (500s) for the price-to-view ratio
tickets.atmosphere: Behind the goals in the lower bowl and the supporters' end where the American Outlaws cluster
tickets.note: Prices are estimates based on typical WC opener/host-nation resale; buy through verified resale only and lock in early, since host-opener inventory tends to climb as the date nears.
